title: With Fuel Running Out and Canadian Flights Suspended, Cuba’s Tourism Is Collapsing
summary_full: The Trump administration’s decision to cut off foreign oil to the island is devastating its tourism industry, a key source of income for a government being pushed to the edge.
summary_public: The Trump administration’s decision to cut off foreign oil to the island is devastating its tourism industry, a key source of income for a government being pushed to the edge.
